prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: enemy attack VFX sheet for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate VFX sprite sheet for enemy attack, block, shield, and HP-hit feedback.
Subject: ten compact VFX sprites in a 5x2 sheet: slash arc, heavy impact, shield block flash, armor crack, red damage burst, poison/dark swipe, stone shockwave, warning spike, enemy charge glow, small hit spark.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game VFX sprites, crisp mobile readability, transparent-style cutouts.
Composition/framing: 5x2 sprite sheet, each effect centered with padding, no labels.
Lighting/mood: tactical enemy feedback, threatening but not gory.
Color palette: red/orange impacts, blue/silver shields, dark violet enemy magic, white highlights.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, avoid opaque full backgrounds.
